hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.
